race.comment: NGONGOTAHA (7) has been racing in great form with three top-three finishes on end, the latest a second over 1628m at this track when he was always up in the leading division. Doubt he has to improve much here and should really be breaking through. WINGS OF LOVE (12) put the writing on the wall last time when fourth at Sale over 1746m, beaten 4.5 lengths after being prominent at the turn. Coming along well and is right in this. THE DECEMBRIST (8) struggled last time but had been solid on resumption at Cranbourne albeit well beaten in fourth. He can improve again third up. DELTAKAI (4) was beaten 4 lengths into sixth over 1400m at Ballarat Synthetic at his latest appearance. Going okay and can run into the money.
